datasets.name: f8f82260
queryLines:
SELECT * FROM production.raw.regua_atendente_mensagens_enviadas
WHERE
    eh_somente_teste = false

-- TODO: adicionar nome_rede e talvez nome_loja
-- TODO: adicioanr o codigo_externo do atendnete tbm, just in case, apesar de o mais importante aqui ser o id_atendente

datasets.name: 20c1ca40
queryLines:
WITH daily_messages AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('DAY', data_hora_envio) AS data,
        COUNT(*) AS total_mensagens
    FROM regua_atendente_mensagens_enviadas
    WHERE eh_somente_teste = false
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('DAY', data_hora_envio)
),
daily_errors AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('DAY', data_hora_erro) AS data,
        COUNT(*) AS total_erros
    FROM regua_atendente_mensagens_enviadas_erros
    WHERE eh_somente_teste = false
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('DAY', data_hora_erro)
)
SELECT 
    COALESCE(m.data, e.data) AS data,
    COALESCE(m.total_mensagens, 0) AS total_mensagens,
    COALESCE(e.total_erros, 0) AS total_erros,
    CASE 
        WHEN COALESCE(m.total_mensagens, 0) > 0 
        THEN (COALESCE(e.total_erros, 0) * 100.0) / m.total_mensagens
        ELSE 0
    END AS taxa_erro_percentual
FROM daily_messages m
FULL OUTER JOIN daily_errors e ON m.data = e.data
ORDER BY data
